reason: Check global Stage2 RVV authority, descriptor/source-front-door prohibitions, and common EmitC boundary after the owner move.
Check segment2 owner-boundary exact-one selection, provider-plan validation, segment2 statement-plan consumption, and fail-closed diagnostics.
Check provider-built route authority and common EmitC neutrality remain intact.

Check registry/provider interfaces do not derive route support from names, manifests, metadata, descriptors, or source-front-door markers.
Check focused tests, generated-bundle evidence, authority scans, and ssh rvv requirements.
Check typed selected-body facts remain authoritative and metadata stays mirror-only.
Check plugin-locality review after moving segment2 provider-plan construction.
Check no high-level compute or core-dialect semantics were introduced.
